texto: What is so frightening about [writing]? I still don't know. Perhaps it's the horrible knowledge that no matter how well you write, the resultant product will never correlate exactly to the truth, will never arrive with quite the melodious voice you hear in the acoustic cavity of your mind.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brenda Miller que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What is so frightening about [writing]? I still don't know. Perhaps it's the horrible knowledge t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, writer, writing, com foco em writing e writing-advice.

frase_original: What is so frightening about [writing]? I still don't know. Perhaps it's the horrible knowledge that no matter how well you write, the resultant product will never correlate exactly to the truth, will never arrive with quite the melodious voice you hear in the acoustic cavity of your mind.
